title: jeffreya decurrens
intro: Jeffreya decurrens, also known as Western Yarrow, is a flowering plant native to the western regions of North America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Jeffreya decurrens include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as a natural antihistamine. Herbal preparations of Jeffreya decurrens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including colds, flu, and skin conditions.
